'''Tra's M'ins''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the final decades of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]], Tra's M'ins was [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], eventually attaining the rank of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]]. Master M'ins, through an extended period of individual study, became a noted [[Jedi Diplomat|diplomat]] for the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. Subject to receiving missions from the [[Council of Reconciliation/Legends|Council of Reconciliation]], Master M'ins was dispatched to mediate the [[Duinuogwuin–Gotal conflict|Duinuogwuin-Gotal conflict]], a war sometime from [[35 BBY/Legends|35 BBY]] to [[33 BBY/Legends|33 BBY]].<ref name="DFRS" />

Accompanied by fellow Jedi Master [[Jorus C'baoth]], M'ins' negotiation attempts were hijacked by the lower ranked C'Baoth. The [[Human/Legends|Human]] Jedi hammered out an agreement between the [[Duinuogwuin/Legends|Duinuogwuins]] and the [[Gotal/Legends|Gotals]], ending the conflict and gaining a powerful reputation amongst the Order.<ref name="DFRS" />
